$comment: Module manifest — the contract between this module and the Jarvis core (Plugin Architecture / Separation of concerns). Status 'planned': structurally valid scaffold for a future capability. Defensive/compliance context.
name: ISO 27001 Assistant
description: Explains ISO/IEC 27001 controls, assists with gap analysis against the Annex A controls, and drafts policy text. Advisory only — not a substitute for a qualified auditor.

envVars.name: ISO27001_ASSISTANT_ENABLED
envVars.description: Set to 'true' to enable this module's workflow.
